issues.detail: Instructions are not specific and unambiguous, lacking clear guidance.
Skill file does not cover error scenarios or edge cases.

scenarios.name: GenServer rate limiter
scenarios.rationale: Baseline uses Agent and lacks scheduled cleanup; treatment matches the documented GenServer + Process.send_after + supervisor pattern exactly.

scenarios.name: LiveView real-time dashboard
scenarios.rationale: Baseline subscribes unconditionally and uses the old ~L sigil; treatment uses connected?(socket) guard, ~H sigil, and PubSub-driven handle_info as the SKILL prescribes.
